title: Frankenstein by Guillermo del Toro Wins Three Academy Awards
text: Director Guillermo del Toro's film Frankenstein has won three Oscars at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony held in Los Angeles. The film had its world premiere in Competition at the 82nd Venice International Film Festival in 2025. The three awards honored were: Best Production Design – Tamara Deverell and Shane Vieau, Best Costume Design – Kate Hawley, and Best Makeup and Hairstyling – Mike Hill, Jordan Samuel, and Cliona Furey. Frankenstein received nine total nominations from the Venice Film Festival, including Best Film. Overall, the 82nd Venice International Film Festival earned 15 nominations across four Competition films. La Biennale di Venezia also noted that another Venice-premiered film achieved success: L'Attachement – The Ties That Bind Us by Carine Tardieu won Best Film and Best Adapted Screenplay at the César Awards. The next Venice International Film Festival will take place September 2-12, 2026.
